prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: CRYSTAL STRUCTURE OF HUMAN ANNEXIN I AT 2.5 ANGSTROMS RESOLUTION. Entity description: ANNEXIN I. Entry keywords: CALCIUM/PHOSPHOLIPID BINDING CALCIUM/PHOSPHOLIPID BINDING, CALCIUM-PHOSPHOLIPID BINDING complex. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.414013; mean_interface=0.271978; max_segment_membrane_density=0.411376; mean_disorder=0.146803. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.
V68 E65 generic complex control source. generic_complex_only generic complex only; complex annotation alone is not biological_oligomer_context, not obligate assembly, and not assembly_required_core.
